intro_html: Hi, here are your charter options for your requested dates. We've picked a few yachts that match your requirements.
itinerary_html: Sample week: Day 1–2 base area, Day 3–4 island hop, Day 5–7 return. We can tailor this to your preferences.
notes_html: Contact us to confirm availability and next steps. This proposal is valid for 14 days.
